title: Website Template

posts.author: aprileblair (Aprile Blair)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Does anyone know of or have a suggestion for a website layout board template to use? Specifically will be used to track the wire frame and content details. Nothing involving development (I map it out and then it goes over to the developer). Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @aprileblair, thanks for posting and welcome to the community!

I would write into support@monday.com about this. I’m thinking our Collaborative Whiteboard might be a good way to go to brainstorm website layouts and map things out, but perhaps there will be other solutions we think of when we learn a bit more about your use case
